title: MOJO - 5pc Dinosaur Prehistoric Life Playset | Hand-Painted Toy Figure | Prehistoric Life Collection | True to Life & Highly Detailed | Designed in UK
features: 🦕 MY FIRST DINOSAUR PLAYSET WITH 5 PIECES - Embark on a prehistoric adventure with MOJO's My First Dinosaur Playset, featuring 5 iconic dinosaurs: T-Rex, Stegosaurus, Brachiosaurus, Velociraptor, and Triceratops. Each figure in this set is hand-painted, part of their Prehistoric Life Collection, and crafted to showcase the distinct features and magnificence of these ancient creatures. Perfect for sparking the imagination of young paleontologists, this set is ideal for educational play.

🎨 HAND-PAINTED & DURABLE - Our figures are hand-painted by MOJO artisans, ensuring a unique piece every time. Its mixed colors and meticulous detailing make it a standout piece in any collection. Perfect for those interested in wildlife and animal figures.
📐PERFECT SIZE - It's a toy that can withstand playtime and a figure that can endure as part of a collection. From the playroom to the display case, it's a toy created for adventure.

🌍 PREHISTORIC LIFE - Designed in the UK, this dinosaur is part of MOJO's expansive Prehistoric Life Collection. Explore the age of dinosaurs with figures ranging from a Ankylosaurus Dinosaur toy to a Brachiosaurus figure. Collect them all and create your own prehistoric sanctuary.

🎁 MOJO: DESIGNED IN UK - The perfect gift for animal enthusiasts and collectors alike. Whether it's for a birthday, a special occasion, or just because. Let your loved ones explore the wild without leaving home.
